rendered_specs.before_summary: title: Last Z Beginner Guide (2026) — Best Start and Early Mistakes to Avoid | h1: Last Z Beginner Guide — Best Start and Early Mistakes to Avoid | meta: Best beginner path in Last Z: early priorities, key upgrades, alliance timing, and the first mistakes to avoid in your opening days. | verified: Best early plan for most players: finish the tutorial, follow main quests, join an active alliance fast, push HQ correctly, and save diamonds for long-term value instead of random early spending.
rendered_specs.desired_after_summary: Add a concise early clarification that for newer servers Season 2 is Winter, Desert was canceled or skipped, and older guides that call Season 2 Desert may be outdated. Keep the page primarily a beginner start guide.
rendered_specs.suggested_content:
Add this callout inside the existing `Quick Answer` `.qa-callouts` block, after the current `Core rule` callout: ```html

i Season naming note: on newer servers, Season 2 is Winter. Older guides may call Season 2 Desert, but Desert was canceled or skipped for current servers, so follow Winter naming when planning your early timeline.

```
